---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

**Which component does this affect?**
- [ ] Backend (snap_BE)
- [ ] Web (snap_FE)
- [ ] Desktop (snap_PC)
- [ ] Mobile (snap_mobile)
- [ ] All / cross-platform

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the problem you're facing.

**Proposed solution**
Describe how you'd like it to work.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about.

**Additional context**
Mockups, examples, or references to similar features elsewhere.
